sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66527" key="meso/fqalmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεσ-όφθαλμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n66527.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with middle-sized eyes</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg022:202" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Par.Ptol.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">202</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
